programme.title: Colors
programme.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a seasoned cop (Robert Duvall) and his new partner (Sean Penn) are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the slums of East Los Angeles.

programme.title: At Close Range
programme.desc: A farm boy (Sean Penn) looking for excitement finds himself on a collision course with his smooth-talking gang leader father (Christopher Walken) in this "powerfully disturbing" (Newsweek) tale based on the story of real-life killer Bruce Johnston.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Robert De Niro, Jean Reno and Stellan Skarsgard headline a stellar cast in director John Frankenheimer's action-packed and intelligent spy thriller about a group of for-hire mercenaries out to steal a top-secret briefcase for a mysterious client.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Billy Crystal and Gregory Hines have winning chemistry as two of the Windy City's finest (and wildest) cops, out to nail Chicago's toughest criminal in this comedy thriller that asks the question, "How come the bad guys always drive the good cars?"

programme.title: Harley Davidson And The Marlboro Man
programme.desc: Mickey Rourke and Don Johnson star in this four-lane genre collision of biker movie, heist thriller, buddy flick and sci-fi pic that will take you to the hardline of action and adventure! Co-starring Tom Sizemore, Chelsea Field and Vanessa Williams.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: Kevin Costner and Gene Hackman star in this taut, political thriller that sees Costner, as Naval Commander Tom Farrell, on the hunt for a very real killer and a very unreal Russian mole, and all the clues lead back to himself. Sean Young co-stars.

programme.title: The Package
programme.desc: Gene Hackman and Tommy Lee Jones headline this explosive action-thriller about Green Beret (Hackman) who uncovers a terrifying military conspiracy when he is tasked with escorting a U.S. soldier (Jones) back to the States for a court martial.

programme.title: Cutter's Way
programme.desc: Suspected of murder, Richard Bone (Jeff Bridges) turns to his best friend, Alex Cutter (John Heard), for help finding the real killer. But when their suspect turns the tables on them, a cunning game of cat-and-mouse ignites into a full-blown war!

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: When an explosion jolts Boston, bomb squad expert Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) is thrust into the most harrowing work of his career. And when evidence points to his former mentor (Tommy Lee Jones), Dove must face a bitter enemy and a haunting past.

programme.title: The Killer Elite
programme.desc: James Caan and Robert Duvall give stellar performances in this tense, action-packed thriller that explores betrayal in the murky world of assassins.

programme.title: Thief
programme.desc: Michael Mann ("Manhunter") directs this stylish, action-packed drama that stars James Caan ("Misery") as a master safe cracker who is planning his last heist for the sake of a woman, Tuesday Weld ("Who'll Stop The Rain?"), and a new life.

programme.title: Rollerball (1975)
programme.desc: James Caan stars as a rollerball champ in this fast-hitting, action-packed glimpse into a dystopian future in the year 2018 where a brutal, no-holds-barred sport takes the place of war, and murder is just a part of the game! John Houseman co-stars.
